  • Uses of ComponentDiscoverer in org.codehaus.plexus.component.discovery

    Subinterfaces of ComponentDiscoverer in org.codehaus.plexus.component.discovery
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    AnnotationBasedComponentDiscoverer
    Component discoverer which relies on annotation information to define component definitions.
    interface 
    ResourceBasedComponentDiscoverer
    Component discoverer which relies on the metadata for the components residing in a resource that can be found in a classloader.
